pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Technical Foundations KSA (composite 0.407)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Technician job postings does not surface this Technical Foundations competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
